caption: A screen recording shows a presentation titled "Rural Community Food System" being shared during a video call. A man with short dark hair, wearing a dark shirt, is visible in a small webcam window in the top right corner. The main screen displays a slide with the heading "Introduction" and the question, "What constitutes a sustainable localized food system for a rural community?" The slide includes several bullet points under "Session Videos" and a diagram featuring text such as "Availability," "13R Retailers willing to source local," "Local Sustainable Consumption," and "Product Cost/Price." The presenter’s mouse cursor moves across the screen, highlighting different elements. As the video progresses, a "Legend" box appears in the bottom right of the slide, and the cursor shifts from the center of the diagram toward the right side of the screen, specifically near the text "Local Sustainable Consumption."
